remember: Recall the historical context of the poem 'Birth' by A.K. Ramanujan
Identify the poet's use of imagery and symbolism
Explain the significance of the title 'Birth' in the context of the poem
understand: Analyze the poet's use of language to convey the theme of birth
Explain how the poet's personal experience influences the tone of the poem
Identify the poetic devices used by the poet to create a sense of wonder
apply: Use evidence from the poem to support an interpretation of the theme of birth
Apply poetic devices (e.g. metaphor, simile) to a piece of writing about a personal experience
Use the poem as a model to create a piece of descriptive writing about a memorable event
analyze: Compare and contrast the poet's use of imagery and symbolism in 'Birth' with the use of these devices in another poem
Analyze the ways in which the poet's use of language contributes to the overall effect of the poem
Explain how the poem's theme and tone relate to the poet's personal experience

ncert_objectives: Understand the historical context of the poem 'Birth'
Explain the significance of the title 'Birth' in the context of the poem
Identify the poetic devices used by the poet to create a sense of wonder
board_exam_objectives: Recall the central idea of the poem 'Birth'
Explain how the poet uses language to convey the theme of birth
Identify the poet's use of imagery and symbolism
